title: RedemptionTypeValues
description:
Rewards are used for travel-related purchases.

Example:
Points → flight tickets or hotel bookings.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Direct Account Transfer Redemption
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Redeemed value is transferred to a bank account.

Comment:
30 EUR cashback -> transferred to savings account

x-enumeration-literals.name: Statement Credit Redemption
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Rewards or cashback are applied to reduce the credit card outstanding balance.

Comment: 
Example:$50 cashback → deducted from next credit card bill.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Merchant Payment / Voucher Redemption
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Rewards are converted into vouchers or used directly with partner merchants.

Example:
5,000 points → $50 shopping voucher.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Product / Gift Redemption
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Points are exchanged for physical or digital products.

Comment:
Example: Points → headphones, gift cards, gadgets.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Cash Withdrawal Redemption
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Rewards can be withdrawn as cash (if allowed).

Comment:
Example:Redeem $100 cashback → cash payout.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Travel Redemption
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Rewards are used for travel-related purchases.

Comment:
Example: Points → flight tickets or hotel bookings.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Fee Waiver / Charge Offset Redemption
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Rewards are used to waive or reduce bank fees.

Comment:
Example: Points → annual card fee waiver.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Loan Offset / EMI Payment Redemption
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Rewards are used to reduce loan outstanding or installment payments.

Comment:
Example: Cashback → used to reduce loan principal.
